underlying_goal: Troubleshoot plan mode task generation issue, clean up project (remove codex skill, LSP plugins), and release v6.0.0
friction_detail: Claude initially linked the plan mode issue to ultra-plan instead of plan mode itself, and missed updating settings.json version to 6.0.0 during release.
brief_summary: User troubleshot plan mode issues, removed codex skill and LSP plugins, and released v6.0.0, all successfully completed with minor oversights.
